name: Dr. Richard Heitman
title: Founder & Executive Chairman
bio: Pioneering real estate investor and visionary founder of Heitman Capital Management. With over 30 years of experience, has built one of the most successful real estate and alternative investment firms globally.

name: Jennifer Chapman
title: Chief Executive Officer
bio: Dynamic leader overseeing all business operations and strategic initiatives. Drives innovation, operational excellence, and sustained growth across all investment platforms and geographic regions.

name: Michael Torres
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Senior investment strategist with extensive expertise in real estate, private equity, and alternative assets. Leads investment decisions and portfolio management across all asset classes and fund strategies.

name: Sarah Anderson
title: Global Head of Real Estate
bio: Seasoned real estate professional managing the $180B real estate portfolio. Specializes in commercial, residential, and industrial properties across major markets worldwide.

name: David Kumar
title: Head of Private Equity
bio: Experienced private equity executive leading acquisition strategy and portfolio company management. Focuses on value creation through operational improvements and strategic growth initiatives.

name: Elizabeth Foster
title: Chief Financial Officer
bio: Finance expert ensuring prudent capital management and financial strategy. Oversees corporate finance, investor relations, and financial planning for all business segments.

name: James Mitchell
title: Head of Debt Strategies
bio: Credit specialist managing $80B debt portfolio with focus on risk management and return optimization. Expertise in corporate debt, structured finance, and distressed opportunities.

name: Lisa Wong
title: Chief Risk Officer
bio: Risk management professional establishing firm-wide risk framework and compliance protocols. Ensures regulatory adherence and protects capital across all investment activities.

name: Robert Chen
title: General Counsel
bio: Legal expert leading corporate governance, legal matters, and regulatory compliance. Manages all legal aspects of investments and corporate transactions for the firm.

name: Victoria Petrov
title: Chief Operating Officer
bio: Operations leader driving organizational efficiency and process optimization. Oversees infrastructure, technology, human resources, and operational excellence across all divisions.
